title: Exposure: Village Chest Addon
description: Addon for Exposure that makes film tapes, potions and cameras spawn in village chests
body:
# **Exposure: Village Chest Addon**

[![Modrinth Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd2ea3cdec02ab0293f3439729230b00179b7fdf.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/abandoned-watchtowers) [![CurseForge Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6434a03cc60c25cda599cc38e579672513d8e6a.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/abandoned-watchtowers) [![Youtube Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa0320bef2db7e9ff5f983efdc3e322769152f9a.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@MasterOWS)

This is a addon for the mod [Exposure](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure) that adds film tapes, potions and cameras to villages

## 📄**List of Current items:**
- Black and white film
- Colored film
- Awkward potions
- Thick potions
- Mundane potions
- Camera


## 💡**Additional info:**

In every type of village there is a house with a light table, it is not garanteed to generate in every village

In the houses called "plains_medium_house_2", "desert_medium_house_1", "taiga_medium_house_2", "savanna_medium_house_1" and "snowy_medium_house_2" a light table will spawn.

All village houses with normal village loot will have the new items, meaning any house that is not a blacksmith, cartographer etc will have the new loot.

meaning any chests with "village_[VILLAGE TYPE]_house" will have the new loot, for example "village_plains_house"

## ⚖️**Guidelines:**

Feel free to use Exposure: Village Chest addon in any modpacks or Videos, credit is not necessary but highly recommended.

Only **CurseForge** and **Modrinth** are official sites, other websites can contain malware or viruses in their files.

## **📝Credits:**

This mod is HEAVILY inspired by [Calvin](https://www.youtube.com/@Calvin9000) (aka Cxlvxns) own privat mod, this is not the same mod but is based on his own mod.
